description:
This quiz tests advanced JavaScript knowledge of ECMAScript versions (ES2015 to ES2022) through challenging multiple-choice questions, with a playful yet technical tone designed to engage experienced developers.
Topics: ECMAScript 2015 (ES6), ECMAScript 2022 (ES13), JavaScript syntax evolution, Modern JavaScript features, Version-specific updates
Audience: Experienced JavaScript developers seeking to validate or expand their understanding of recent language standards and updates.
